headline: Can Molina Healthcare (MOH) Trade At A Premium After Its Contract Win?
summary: Molina Healthcare stock has climbed over the past year and recently touched a 52 week high after winning a large Illinois Medicaid contract, yet its valuation checks still lean expensive and the long term share price record over three years is weak. For investors, that mix of recent enthusiasm and a low value score raises the question of whether the current price already builds in much of the good news. Over the past three years, Molina Healthcare shares have declined 29.2%, which contrasts...
